slides.description: At Harohalli Educational Trust, we provide more than just education. We build the foundation for a lifetime of success and character.

About.title: About Us
About.trust_description: Founded with a vision to make quality education accessible to every child, Harohalli Educational Trust has been a beacon of knowledge for over 25 years. We believe in nurturing not just students, but future leaders who are ethically grounded and socially responsible.
About.trustee_desc: Led by dedicated educators and social reformers.
About.growth_desc: Focusing on physical, mental, and spiritual well-being.

schools.central_desc: Affiliated with CBSE, focusing on holistic development and modern pedagogical techniques.
schools.high_desc: Established in 1995, following the state curriculum with a strong emphasis on academic discipline.
schools.kg_desc: A playful environment for our youngest learners to Bloom and Grow.

history_vision.title: The Journey and Future Vision of Harohalli Educational Institution.
history_vision.p1: Known as the “Gandhi of Kanakapura Taluk”, MLA, educationist, founder president of Grama Vidya Pracharak Sangha, Karmayogi Late. Pujya S. Kariappa, “Harohalli Vidya Sahayata” was born in 1958 for the educational development of the children of Harohalli and Maralvadi hoblis under the guidance of Karmayogi. In those days, it was a dream for rural farmer children, especially girls, to get secondary education. In such a situation, it is not an exaggeration to say that our educational institution was born like an ‘oasis’ in the other land.
history_vision.p2: The people who stood behind Pujya S. Kariappa were the founding president of the institution, who generously donated land (about two acres) of the institution, Late H.N. Gopalakrishna Rao. Along with him Late. H.R. Seenappa (Founding Secretary), Late. H.V. Subrahmanya Iyer, Late. R. Thimmaiah, Late. Abdul Sattar (Treasurer), G.K. Doddamuddegowda – etc. worked hard.
history_vision.p3: In later days, The Late. K.C. Ankaiah, Late. H. M. Mallaiah, Late. H.K. Kalegowda, Late. Sri. G.K.Doddamuddegowda, Late. Basavalingaiah, Sri H. M. Mallaiah, Late. Puttaswamayya, N. Ramadevara Holla and later office bearers G.M. Shankar Siddegowda, Anjunappa, Smt. Lakshmi Devamma, Smt. Sushilamma, Sri B. Kunnegowda, Sri. Ankappa, Sri. Sayyid Bhasha, etc. The institution was able to move towards progress with the encouragement and support of other elders and education enthusiasts, and we express our gratitude to all of them.
history_vision.p4: In 1969, the birth centenary year of Mahatma Gandhi, Bapu Higher Primary School was started in his name. In 1972, “Kastur Ba Nursery School” was started in the name of Mahatma Gandhiji’s wife Smt. Kastur Ba. This later evolved into ‘Kastur Ba English Medium School’ from 1999 and is running from PKG, LKG & UKG classes to 10th class.
history_vision.p5: The students of our schools have participated in sports and cultural activities at school and inter-school levels and have brought many plaques and prizes to the schools. There are many instances where our school students have participated in district and state level Kannada debate competitions and won prizes and brought good name to the school.
history_vision.p6: As a result of the forward-thinking leadership of Shri L. Narasimhaiah, who was the head teacher for three decades and was a Gandhian, and other efficient teachers, our rural high school was able to be recognized as the best school in the district. It was possible to instill values such as morality, discipline, culture, social commitment and leadership in the students. As a result, many students who studied in this school: IAS, KAS, engineers, medical doctors, famous businessmen, political leaders, writers, professors, poets, musicians, have made their own mark at the state and national levels.
history_vision.p7: In 1983-84, to commemorate the completion of its 25th year, the “Silver Festival” was celebrated with great enthusiasm. The institute, which completed 50 years in the year 2008-09 itself, decided to celebrate its Golden Jubilee in a meaningful way. Consequently, it was decided to undertake many projects to make it memorable forever. Among these, first of all, a 14-room RCC building has been constructed adjacent to the ‘Bapu Higher Primary School’ on the east side of the Institution’s playground.
history_vision.p8: The old brick Rural high school and Bapu Higher Primary School buildings were demolished and this huge three-storey 36-room RCC building that stands on that site has been constructed with the help of many donors, some members of the Legislative Council, Legislative Assembly and Rajya Sabha from the local development funds and the institution’s funds.
history_vision.fw_1_desc: The pre-university college, which was the wish of the institution for many years, was started in the year 2015-16 and named as “Mahatma Pre-university College”. (Has Arts and Commerce departments).
history_vision.fw_2_desc: A spacious and well-maintained open auditorium with a seating capacity of about 1500 students has been constructed in the school premises to facilitate various activities. It is named Smt. Jayalaxmamma Gopala Krishnarao Hall in honor of the Founding President's wife.
history_vision.fw_3_desc: A modern urinal and toilet have been constructed in an area of about 650 square feet for the convenience of all the girls studying in the school.
history_vision.up_1_desc: Especially, it is intended to open some vocational skill training departments that will help talented rural children who are unable to get higher education to get employment. For example: tailoring, computer printing, rewinding, mobile repair etc.
history_vision.up_2_desc: Computer education is essential to equip students for today's modern and technological world. Since this education provided at the school level is not adequate, after S.S.L.C and P.U., it aims to provide separate Computer education to the youth with a view to employment.
history_vision.up_3_desc: Currently, there is a need for clean drinking water for school students, so there is a plan to arrange drinking water through a separate tube well/rain water collection. The estimated cost of this is Rs. 5 Lakhs.
history_vision.up_4_desc: The aim is to provide free uniforms, school fees, books and financial assistance for higher studies for the educational progress of deserving and poor children. A permanent fund of about Rs. 10 Lakhs has been established.
history_vision.up_5_desc: A school garden has been planned to be built with a view to enhancing the beauty of the school.
history_vision.up_6_desc: In the future, it is planned to open courses like BA/B.Com., BCA/BBM etc. In order to fulfill all these intended desires, the support and encouragement of the Old Students' Union and the public is very necessary.
history_vision.footer: We request all the esteemed people to directly and indirectly cooperate in all the growth and future projects of the above institution and express our heartfelt gratitude on behalf of the Institution.

VisionMission.title: Our Vision &
VisionMission.subtitle: Guided by our motto of "Knowledge is Power," we are committed to building a brighter future through academic excellence and personal growth.
VisionMission.vision_desc: To be a globally recognized center of education that empowers students to achieve excellence in all facets of life while maintaining strong cultural and ethical values.
VisionMission.mission_desc: To provide a nurturing environment where students are encouraged to explore their potential, develop critical thinking, and build the character necessary to serve society.

Footer.mission_short: Empowering future generations through quality education and holistic development since 1995.

PUCollege.title: Mahathma PU College
PUCollege.history_desc: Mahathma Pre-University College was established in the academic year 2015-16 under the aegis of Harohalli Educational Institution. Initially offering Arts (HEGP) and Commerce (EGBA) combinations, we expanded to include Commerce with Computer Science (EBACS) in 2023-24 to meet the growing aspirations of our students.
